allow:
Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "
from config.settings import get_settings
s = get_settings\(\)
print\('notion_renkau_long_page_id:', s.notion_renkau_long_page_id\)
print\('notion_renkau_short_page_id:', s.notion_renkau_short_page_id\)
")

Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "
from ui.content_folder import ContentFolder
folders_short = ContentFolder.list_all\('short'\)
print\('Short folders:', [f.display_name for f in folders_short]\)
if folders_short:
    print\('Keywords:', folders_short[0].keywords\)
    print\('Context length:', len\(folders_short[0].get_context\(\)\)\)
")

Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "
from ui.content_folder import ContentFolder
folders_long = ContentFolder.list_all\(video_type='long'\)
folders_short = ContentFolder.list_all\(video_type='short'\)
print\('Long folders:', [f.display_name for f in folders_long]\)
print\('Short folders:', [f.display_name for f in folders_short]\)
")

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -q 'content/renkau/.*\.md$' && cd /Users/okugawakodai/Documents/youtube-agent && .venv/bin/python scripts/update_notion_knowledge.py; } 2>/dev/null || true
